title: The Staging Drop
description:
Amaka drops a zip of files onto your workstation. 'Tunde grabbed these from The Griot's staging server before it went dark. Start poking around. Find what should not be there. The flag will make itself obvious when you read the right file.'

She leaves without telling you which file matters, what format the flag takes, or which commands to run. You have a shell. That is it.

The flag format for the whole programme is TRAN{...}. When you find yours, paste it in the answer box.

welcome: Sankofa SOC forensic shell — isolated lab environment.
You have been dropped into /staging. Type `help` for commands.

files./staging/README.md:
Staging server drop — recovered 2024-01-14 03:47 UTC.
Contents: assorted files pulled from /opt/legacy/ before the host was quarantined.
Do not modify. This is evidence.
files./staging/config.env:
APP_NAME=sankofa-legacy
APP_ENV=staging
# TODO: rotate before prod promotion
API_KEY=c2Fua29mYS1kZW1vLWtleS0yMDIz
FEATURE_FLAGS=import_url,debug_panel,dev_routes
files./staging/notes.txt:
reminder: admin panel at /legacy-admin/ — credentials in .creds.bak

griot keeps coming back for the /legacy-admin/export endpoint. rate-limit?
